name: Jolly Santa Waving
subject: holidays/santa
prompt: a jolly Santa Claus standing and waving one mittened hand hello, a big round belly, a fluffy beard, a tasseled hat, a wide belt with a buckle, rosy cheeks and a warm friendly smile

name: Santa on His Sleigh
subject: holidays/santa
prompt: Santa Claus sitting in a curved sleigh piled with wrapped presents, holding the reins, a couple of reindeer harnessed in front, a few stars and snowflakes in the night sky around him

name: Santa by the Fireplace
subject: holidays/santa
prompt: Santa Claus crouching beside a cozy fireplace placing a gift, three stockings hanging from the mantel, a decorated garland above, a small fire and a few logs in the hearth

name: Santa with Toy Sack
subject: holidays/santa
prompt: Santa Claus carrying a large bulging sack of toys over his shoulder, a teddy bear and a candy cane poking out of the top, his other hand steadying the bag, a cheerful expression

name: Santa and Reindeer
subject: holidays/santa
prompt: Santa Claus standing next to a friendly reindeer with big antlers and a round nose, his arm around the reindeer's neck, a small bell collar on the reindeer, snowy ground beneath them

name: Cute Baby Santa
subject: holidays/santa
prompt: an adorable round baby-style Santa with a chubby face, oversized hat slipping a little, big sparkly eyes, tiny mittens, and a short fluffy beard, drawn with simple chunky shapes for little hands

name: Santa Face Close-Up
subject: holidays/santa
prompt: a close-up of Santa Claus's smiling face filling the frame, twinkling eyes behind round glasses, rosy round cheeks, a thick curly beard and moustache, bushy eyebrows, and a hat with a fluffy pom-pom

name: Santa Down the Chimney
subject: holidays/santa
prompt: Santa Claus squeezing down a brick chimney with his sack of toys, only his upper body and arms visible above the chimney top, a starry sky and a snow-dusted rooftop around him

name: Santa Reading His List
subject: holidays/santa
prompt: Santa Claus holding a long unrolled scroll list in both hands, peering at it through his glasses with a thoughtful smile, a feather quill tucked behind his ear, his hat tilted slightly

name: Santa and Christmas Tree
subject: holidays/santa
prompt: Santa Claus standing beside a tall decorated Christmas tree topped with a star, hanging an ornament on a branch, a few wrapped presents stacked at the base of the tree

name: Santa with Snowman
subject: holidays/santa
prompt: Santa Claus standing next to a cheerful snowman with a carrot nose, a scarf, and twig arms, both waving, a few falling snowflakes and a small snowy hill behind them

name: Santa Ringing a Bell
subject: holidays/santa
prompt: Santa Claus holding up a large jingle bell and ringing it, his mouth open as if calling out a merry greeting, his other hand on his hip, motion lines around the bell and a big festive grin
